title: Reinsel's Reduction Method for Vector Autoregression (VAR)
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequential process of Gregory C. Reinsel's method for reducing the rank of a VAR model to identify cointegrating relationships.
relationships: Start with a Full-Rank VAR Model, then hypothesize the Cointegration Rank (r). Proceed to Reduced Rank Estimation. Check Residual Diagnostics; if they are satisfactory, proceed to the Final VECM Model. If not, return to revise the hypothesized rank.
